nodes.name: ChangeProductKey
nodes.description: Installs a product key for Windows 10 desktop devices. Does not reboot.

nodes.name: CheckApplicability
nodes.description: Returns TRUE if the entered product key can be used for an edition upgrade of Windows 10 desktop devices.

children.name: DeviceLicensingLastError
children.description: Returns the last error code of Refresh/Remove Device License operation. Value would be empty(0) in absence of error.

children.name: DeviceLicensingLastErrorDescription
children.description: Returns last error description from Device Licensing. Value would be empty, if error decription can not be evaluated.

children.name: DeviceLicensingStatus
children.description: Returns the status of Refresh/Remove Device License operation.

children.name: LicenseType
children.description: License Type: User Based Subscription or Device Based Subscription

nodes.name: Edition
nodes.description: Returns a value that maps to the Windows 10 edition running on desktop or mobile devices. Take the value, convert it into its hexadecimal equivalent and search the GetProductInfo function page on MSDN for edition information.

nodes.name: LicenseKeyType
nodes.description: Returns the parameter type used by Windows 10 devices for an edition upgrade. Windows 10 desktop devices require a product key for an edition upgrade. Windows 10 mobile devices require a license for an edition upgrade.

nodes.name: SMode
nodes.description: Interior node for managing S mode.

children.name: Status
children.description: Returns the status of the latest SwitchFromSMode or SwitchingPolicy set request.

children.name: SwitchFromSMode
children.description: Switches a device out of S mode if possible. Does not reboot.

children.name: SwitchingPolicy
children.description: Policy that determines whether a consumer can switch the device out of S mode

enum.description: No Restriction: The user is allowed to switch the device out of S mode.
User Blocked: The admin has blocked the user from switching their device out of S mode. Only the admin can switch the device out of S mode through the SMode/SwitchFromSMode node.

nodes.name: Status
nodes.description: Returns the status of an edition upgrade on Windows 10 desktop and mobile devices.	 Status: 0 = Failed, 1 = Pending, 2 = In progress, 3 = Completed, 4 = Unknown

children.name: Name
children.description: Returns the name of the subscription.

children.name: Status
children.description: Returns the status of the subscription.

children.name: DisableSubscription
children.description: Disable or Enable subscription activation on a device

enum.description: Disable Subscription. It also removes any existing subscription on the device.

children.name: RemoveSubscription
children.description: Remove subscription uninstall subscription license. It also reset subscription type to User Based Subscription.

children.name: SubscriptionLastError
children.description: Error code of last subscription operation. Value would be empty(0) in absence of error.

children.name: SubscriptionLastErrorDescription
children.description: Error description of last subscription operation. Value would be empty, if error description cannot be evaluated.

children.name: SubscriptionType
children.description: Set device to Device Based Subscription or User Based Subscription. For Device Based Subscription this action will automatically acquire the subscription on the device. For User Based Subscription the existing process of user logon will be required.

nodes.name: UpgradeEditionWithLicense
nodes.description: Provide a license for an edition upgrade of Windows 10 mobile devices. Does not require reboot.

nodes.name: UpgradeEditionWithProductKey
nodes.description: Enter a product key for an edition upgrade of Windows 10 desktop devices. Requires reboot.
